agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Festivals Burnaby Grant Program spring 2026 intake
agenda_briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on approving the spring 2026 intake of the Festivals Burnaby Grant Program. If approved, this program would provide funding to local organizations that put on festivals and community events in Burnaby. The decision will determine which events get financial support for the spring 2026 season. This is a proposed grant program — it has not been approved yet.
agenda_briefs.action_required: If you run a festival or community event in Burnaby, watch for the council decision and prepare your grant application for the spring 2026 intake.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
6.1
FESTIVALS BURNABY GRANT PROGRAM -  SPRING 2026 INTAKE
Purpose: To seek Council approval for Festivals Burnaby Grant Program, spring intake recommendation.
agenda_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Agenda — May 05, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: $1,000 grant to Tsleil-Waututh Nation for Giving Circles
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider approving a $1,000 grant to the Tsleil-Waututh Nation Community Society to support their Giving Circles program. This is a proposed donation request on the agenda — it has not yet been approved. If passed, the money would help fund community giving circles run by the Tsleil-Waututh Nation.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
6.2
TSLEIL-WAUTUTH NATION COMMUNITY SOCIETY - GIVING CIRCLES DONATION REQUEST
Purpose: To seek approval to provide a grant for $1,000 to Tsleil-Waututh Nation Community Society to support their Giving Circles.
